summary: Iter169 EchoConcierge Phase 2 + EchoCommand SolveBar - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 24/24 tests passed covering outlets, dining reservations, room upgrades, IRD amenities, transport options, celebration cascade, service recovery, guest folio, and LLM SolveBar. Frontend: SolveBar launcher present, overlay opens, guest auto-detection works (Katherine Mansfield · room 1201), LLM resolution renders with recommended action + execute button + guest line + alternatives. Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+J works. Regression: iter168 Echo Concierge Hub, iter167 FOH panels, iter166 Seed Plant Studio all working.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - SolveBar fully functional with LLM integration

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests (outlets, transport requests, celebrations, recovery cases)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter169 EchoConcierge Phase 2 fully tested. New endpoints: /api/concierge-v2/outlets (5 seeded), /api/concierge-v2/dining/availability (24 tables), /api/concierge-v2/dining/reserve, /api/concierge-v2/rooms (8 rooms), /api/concierge-v2/rooms/upgrades, /api/concierge-v2/ird/amenities (10 amenities), /api/concierge-v2/transport/options (9 options), /api/concierge-v2/transport/request, /api/concierge-v2/celebration/compose (creates 4 cascade children), /api/concierge-v2/celebration/cascade, /api/concierge-v2/recovery/open, /api/concierge-v2/recovery/cases, /api/guest/folio, /api/concierge-v2/solve (LLM). SolveBar UI at bottom-left with ⌘J/Ctrl+J hotkey. LLM may return 502 if budget exhausted - this is expected.

backend_passed: GET /api/concierge-v2/outlets - returns 5+ seeded outlets with hours
POST /api/concierge-v2/outlets/upsert - creates new outlet without id
POST /api/concierge-v2/outlets/upsert - updates existing outlet with id
POST /api/concierge-v2/dining/reserve - creates reservation with table assignment
GET /api/concierge-v2/transport/options - returns 9 options (uber-x, uber-black, lyft-standard, lyft-lux, luxury-sedan, luxury-suv, golf-cart, boat, helicopter)
POST /api/concierge-v2/celebration/compose - creates parent + 4 cascade children (pastry:1, housekeeping:1, florist:1, amenity:1)
GET /api/concierge-v2/celebration/cascade - returns parent + children with _collection field
POST /api/concierge-v2/recovery/open - creates case with id and status='open'
GET /api/guest/folio?guest_id=g-101 - returns folio with dining_reservations, requests, recovery_cases, spend_actual, spend_estimated, counts
POST /api/concierge-v2/solve - returns LLM resolution (or 502 if budget exhausted)
frontend_passed: Guest auto-detection works - typing 'mansfield room 1201' shows guest chip 'Katherine Mansfield · room 1201'
Guest chip (data-testid='solve-guest-g-101') clickable to select guest
Solve result (data-testid='solve-result') renders with headline, root_cause, confidence
Recommended action card shows title, api_hint, and Execute button (data-testid='solve-execute')
Guest line (data-testid='solve-guest-line') shows polished phrase to say to guest
Ctrl+J keyboard shortcut opens SolveBar globally
Regression: Echo Concierge Hub panel loads with department cards and NEW REQUEST form
Regression: /seed/plant Co-Build Studio loads with PLANT SEED button and Record build reel
